enums.name: experiment_status
enums.comment: Lifecycle status of an A/B experiment

enums.name: friendship_status
enums.comment: State of a friendship between two players

enums.name: generation_status
enums.comment: Status of an AI game generation job

enums.name: moderation_action_type
enums.comment: Type of action a moderator can take

enums.name: report_target_type
enums.comment: Entity type that a report targets

enums.name: session_role
enums.comment: Role of a participant in a game session

enums.name: session_status
enums.comment: Status of a multiplayer game session

tables.name: players
tables.comment: Game-layer player identity. Links to auth.users via auth_id; anonymous players have auth_id NULL and is_anonymous true.

columns.name: auth_id
columns.comment: FK to auth.users; NULL for anonymous players

columns.name: is_ai
columns.comment: Whether this player is an AI agent. Disclosed per EU AI Act Art. 52.

columns.name: ai_model
columns.comment: AI model identifier (e.g. claude-opus-4-6). NULL for human players.

checks.name: ck_players_ai_model_consistency
checks.expr: (is_ai = true AND ai_model IS NOT NULL) OR (is_ai = false AND ai_model IS NULL)

tables.name: server_registry
tables.comment: Game server fleet registry. Servers register on startup and heartbeat periodically. Used for room routing and load balancing.

columns.name: id
columns.comment: Human-readable server identifier (e.g. python-1, zig-1)

columns.name: host
columns.comment: Hostname or IP address

columns.name: version
columns.comment: Server version string

tables.name: experiment
tables.comment: A/B experiments with variant definitions and allocation percentage.

columns.name: variants
columns.comment: JSON array of variant definitions

columns.name: allocation_pct
columns.comment: Percentage of eligible players to enroll (0-100)

tables.name: achievement_def
tables.comment: Achievement templates with criteria. Defines what achievements exist.

columns.name: criteria
columns.comment: JSON object describing the unlock criteria

tables.name: friendships
tables.comment: Bidirectional friend relationships. player_a < player_b enforces canonical ordering to prevent duplicates.

tables.name: game_catalog
tables.comment: Game metadata registry. Game bundles live on filesystem; this stores discovery metadata only.

columns.name: generation_model
columns.comment: AI model that generated this game. NULL for human-created. Disclosed per EU AI Act Art. 50.

columns.name: generation_prompt
columns.comment: Original prompt used to generate this game. Stored for transparency.

checks.name: ck_game_catalog_generation_consistency
checks.expr: (ai_generated = true AND generation_model IS NOT NULL) OR (ai_generated = false AND generation_model IS NULL AND generation_prompt IS NULL)

tables.name: chat_messages
tables.comment: Player chat messages, partitioned by month. Retention: 90 days (drop old partitions via cron).

tables.name: player_privacy_settings
tables.comment: Per-player privacy controls. Created at registration with all social features disabled (privacy-by-default).

tables.name: player_age_verification
tables.comment: Age verification and parental consent state. is_minor is true when age < 16. Minors require parental consent before enabling social features.

columns.name: is_minor
columns.comment: True when age < 16

tables.name: player_profile
tables.comment: Extended player profile with bio, avatar, and progression data.

tables.name: player_setting
tables.comment: Key-value player settings. Composite PK on (player_id, key).

tables.name: follow
tables.comment: Player-to-player follows. Composite PK prevents duplicate follows.

tables.name: report
tables.comment: Player-submitted reports against other players, games, comments, or chat messages.

columns.name: target_id
columns.comment: UUID of the reported entity

tables.name: currency_balance
tables.comment: Current virtual currency balance per player. Single row per player.

tables.name: currency_transaction
tables.comment: Immutable ledger of virtual currency transactions.

columns.name: amount
columns.comment: Signed amount (positive = credit, negative = debit)

columns.name: reference_type
columns.comment: Entity type that triggered the transaction (e.g. game_play, achievement)

columns.name: reference_id
columns.comment: UUID of the triggering entity

tables.name: notification
tables.comment: Player notifications for friend requests, likes, achievements, moderation, and system events.

columns.name: data
columns.comment: Arbitrary payload (e.g. friend request ID, game ID)

tables.name: api_keys
tables.comment: API keys for AI agent and service authentication. Keys are hashed; the plaintext is shown only once at creation.

tables.name: experiment_assignment
tables.comment: Tracks which variant a player is assigned to in an experiment.

tables.name: platform_leaderboards
tables.comment: Cross-game leaderboard entries. Each row is a score submission for a specific game.

tables.name: game_version
tables.comment: Versioned game bundles. Each game can have multiple published versions.

columns.name: bundle_size
columns.comment: Bundle size in bytes

tables.name: game_fork
tables.comment: Tracks when a game is forked (remixed) from another. Links parent and child games.

tables.name: game_like
tables.comment: Player likes on games. Composite PK prevents duplicate likes.

tables.name: game_comment
tables.comment: Player comments on games.

tables.name: generation_job
tables.comment: AI game generation jobs. Tracks prompt, model, cost, and progress.

columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: Set after game is created

columns.name: progress
columns.comment: 0-100 percentage

tables.name: session
tables.comment: Multiplayer game sessions (lobbies). Tracks room code, player cap, and lifecycle.

columns.name: config
columns.comment: Game-specific configuration for this session

columns.name: result
columns.comment: Game result data set when session ends

columns.name: server_id
columns.comment: ID of the server hosting this session. NULL for sessions created before fleet routing.

tables.name: achievement
tables.comment: Earned achievements per player. Composite PK prevents duplicate awards.

columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: Game that triggered the unlock, if applicable

tables.name: moderation_action
tables.comment: Actions taken by moderators in response to reports.

tables.name: game_play
tables.comment: Individual play sessions. Tracks when a player plays a game, duration, and score.

tables.name: session_participant
tables.comment: Players in a game session with their role.

tables.name: action_log
tables.comment: Append-only game action log for replay and reconnection. Each action has a monotonically increasing sequence number within its session.

tables.name: state_snapshot
tables.comment: Periodic game state snapshots for fast reconnection. Load latest snapshot, replay actions from its sequence_num forward.
